en-reading-001.title: English Reading Day 1: Arrays & Hashing
en-reading-001.label: Day 1
en-reading-001.author: Mimic Editorial
paragraphs: Today focuses on Arrays & Hashing. Read the passage slowly, then repeat the key sentence with clear stress and natural pauses.
A strong learner does not memorize every answer. A strong learner notices patterns, names the pattern, and explains why it works.
Before moving on, summarize the idea in your own words and say one example aloud.
